title: dnf-plugins-core bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.3.0-24.0.1]
- Added kernel uek and uek core into needs restart list [Orabug: 35860693]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 35378252]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 35366472]
- repoclosure - raise exception for typos in repository name [Orabug: 33074226]

[4.3.0-24]
- Rename dnf4-multisig(8) manual page to dnf-multisig(8) (RHEL-117134)
full_text:
[4.3.0-24.0.1]
- Added kernel uek and uek core into needs restart list [Orabug: 35860693]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 35378252]
- Update upstream references [Orabug: 35366472]
- repoclosure - raise exception for typos in repository name [Orabug: 33074226]

[4.3.0-24]
- Rename dnf4-multisig(8) manual page to dnf-multisig(8) (RHEL-117134)
